Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Jun-15-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Creditors Trade association, Inc.'s motion to compel answers to post-judgment discovery; and for award of monetary sanctions granted as follows:
1. All objections to the specified discovery are waived except attorney-client and attorney work product privilege;
a. Within ten days of the date of service of this order, defendant Fouad Y. Kazzouh shall serve full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's post-judgment interrogatories, and post-judgment request for production of documents;
2. Request for an award of monetary sanctions is granted; sanctions shall issue in the sum of $290.00, payable within thirty days of the date of service of this order. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
